recommendations.title: The First Time
recommendations.overview: A spark of attraction smolders, then ignites, between two teens from different high schools who meet by chance at a party.

recommendations.title: Pandora's Box
recommendations.overview: The rise and inevitable fall of an amoral but naive young woman whose insouciant eroticism inspires lust and violence in those around her.

recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.

recommendations.title: Me, Myself and Her
recommendations.overview: Two women -- a restaurateur and an architect -- have a seemingly idyllic romantic relationship, until the latter encounters a man she had a fling with.

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.

recommendations.title: Caught by a Wave
recommendations.overview: A summer fling born under the Sicilian sun quickly develops into a heartbreaking love story that forces a boy and girl to grow up too quickly.

recommendations.title: Ages of Love
recommendations.overview: In Italy, three men fall in love with three women. First a young engaged lawyer has a fling, then the middle-aged married man has a fling, then a retired man falls in love with his friend's daughter.

recommendations.title: Merv
recommendations.overview: When their beloved dog Merv loses his spark after their split, Anna and Russ are forced into the world's most awkward co-parenting arrangement. Hoping to shake Merv out of his funk, Russ takes him to Florida for a much-needed getaway-only for Anna to

recommendations.title: The Rules of the Game
recommendations.overview: The Marquis de la Chesnaye and his wife host a weekend gala where a variety of complicated romantic and social entanglements between guests and servants lead to tragedy, all against the backdrop of a looming war.

recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.
